CustomField.description: References the successor entitlement that was created through renewal, replacement (conversion or upgrade) or refresh of an entitlement. Used to track forward progression of entitlements through their lifecycle.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The new entitlement that resulted from renewal, replacement (conversion or upgrade) or refresh of an entitlement. This field establishes the relationship between an entitlement and its successor.
CustomField.label: New Entitlement
